notes: Trait default no-op matching C++ virtual postAddNotification base; concrete types override. Intentional Rust divergence from C++ virtual dispatch.
Trait default no-op matching C++ virtual postRemoveNotification base; concrete types override. Intentional Rust divergence from C++ virtual dispatch.
C++ Cylinder base getFirstIndex() returns 0. Confirmed by test_default_cylinder_first_index_returns_zero.
C++ Cylinder base getLastIndex() returns 0. Confirmed by test_default_cylinder_last_index_returns_zero.
C++ Cylinder base getItemTypeCount() returns 0. Confirmed by test_default_cylinder_item_type_count_returns_zero.
C++ Cylinder base getThingIndex() returns -1 (mapped to None in Rust). Confirmed by test_default_cylinder_thing_index_returns_none.

C++ getNumber() via std::get<VARIANT_NUMBER> is UB on wrong variant; Rust panics instead. Confirmed by test_lua_variant_get_number_returns_value_for_number_variant and test_lua_variant_get_number_panics_for_non_number_variant.

C++ getPosition() via std::get<VARIANT_POSITION> is UB on wrong variant; Rust panics instead. Confirmed by test_lua_variant_get_position_returns_value_for_position_variant and test_lua_variant_get_position_panics_for_non_position_variant.

C++ getTargetPosition() via std::get<VARIANT_TARGETPOSITION> is UB on wrong variant; Rust panics instead. Confirmed by test_lua_variant_get_target_position_returns_value_for_target_position_variant and test_lua_variant_get_target_position_panics_for_non_target_position_variant.

C++ getString() via std::get<VARIANT_STRING> is UB on wrong variant; Rust panics instead. Confirmed by test_lua_variant_get_string_returns_value_for_string_variant and test_lua_variant_get_string_panics_for_non_string_variant.
C++ outputmessage.h OutputMessage::getHeaderPosition() returns HEADER_AREA = 0. Confirmed by test_output_message_get_header_position_returns_zero.
C++ Thing::getDescription returns "". Confirmed by test_default_thing_get_description_returns_empty_string.
C++ Thing::getThrowRange returns 1. Confirmed by test_default_thing_get_throw_range_returns_one.
C++ Thing::isPushable returns false. Confirmed by test_default_thing_is_pushable_returns_false.
C++ Thing::isRemovable returns true. Confirmed by test_default_thing_is_removable_returns_true.
C++ Thing::isRemoved default returns true (no parent = removed). Confirmed by test_default_thing_is_removed_returns_true.
C++ Thing::getFirstIndex returns 0. Confirmed by test_default_thing_get_first_index_is_zero.
C++ Thing::getLastIndex returns 0. Confirmed by test_default_thing_get_last_index_is_zero.
C++ Thing::getThingIndex returns -1. Confirmed by test_default_thing_get_thing_index_returns_minus_one.
C++ Thing::getItemTypeCount returns 0. Confirmed by test_default_thing_get_item_type_count_returns_zero.
C++ Thing::isCreature returns false. Confirmed by test_default_thing_is_creature_returns_false.
C++ Thing::isItem returns false. Confirmed by test_default_thing_is_item_returns_false.
C++ Thing::isTeleport returns false. Confirmed by test_default_thing_is_teleport_returns_false.
C++ Thing::isMagicField returns false. Confirmed by test_default_thing_is_magic_field_returns_false.
C++ Thing::isTrashHolder returns false. Confirmed by test_default_thing_is_trash_holder_returns_false.
C++ Thing::isContainer returns false. Confirmed by test_default_thing_is_container_returns_false.
C++ Thing::isDoor returns false. Confirmed by test_default_thing_is_door_returns_false.
C++ Thing::isMoveable returns true. Confirmed by test_default_thing_is_moveable_returns_true.
C++ Thing::isGround returns false. Confirmed by test_default_thing_is_ground_returns_false.
C++ Thing::isInvisible returns false. Confirmed by test_default_thing_is_invisible_returns_false.
C++ Thing::getTile returns null. Confirmed by test_default_thing_get_tile_returns_none.
C++ Thing::getItem returns null. Confirmed by test_default_thing_get_item_returns_none.
C++ Thing::getCreature returns null. Confirmed by test_default_thing_get_creature_returns_none.
C++ Thing::getReceiver returns null. Confirmed by test_default_thing_get_receiver_returns_none.
C++ Thing::getParent returns null. Confirmed by test_default_thing_get_parent_returns_none.
C++ Thing::getPosition returns null/default position. Confirmed by test_default_thing_get_position_tuple_returns_none.

C++ thread_holder_base.h stores ThreadState as AtomicUInt8; back-conversion has no bounds check (UB). Rust panics on invalid values. Confirmed by test_u8_to_state_running_returns_running, test_u8_to_state_closing_returns_closing, test_u8_to_state_terminated_returns_terminated, test_u8_to_state_invalid_panics.

cpp_evidence: forgottenserver-upstream/src/trashholder.cpp — TrashHolder never stores items; addThing immediately calls g_game.internalRemoveItem(item). Retained count is always 0.
cpp_snippet: // trashholder.cpp: addThing -> g_game.internalRemoveItem(item) — item is immediately destroyed, never stored.

cpp_evidence: forgottenserver-upstream/src/trashholder.cpp — addThing calls g_game.internalRemoveItem(item) and g_game.addMagicEffect(...). Cross-crate g_game dispatch deferred to game-glue layer; Rust model drops the item immediately.
cpp_snippet: // trashholder.cpp: void TrashHolder::addThing(int32_t, Thing* thing) { Item* item = thing->getItem(); g_game.internalRemoveItem(item); g_game.addMagicEffect(getPosition(), effect); }
int32_t getElementDamage(const Player*, const Creature*, const Item*) const override { return 0; }
